scripts.db:embed:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f=fs.readdirSync('src/db/migrations').filter(x=>x.endsWith('.sql')).sort().pop();const sql=fs.readFileSync('src/db/migrations/'+f,'utf8').split('--> statement-breakpoint').join('
');fs.writeFileSync('src/db/schema-sql.ts','// AUTO-GENERATED from drizzle-kit. Regenerate: npm run db:generate then npm run db:embed.
export const SCHEMA_SQL = '+JSON.stringify(sql)+';
')"
scripts.package: npm run bundle && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node22-win-x64 --output dist/seven-backend.exe
scripts.package:mac: npm run bundle && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --no-bytecode --public --targets node22-macos-arm64 --output dist/seven-backend-arm64 && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --no-bytecode --public --targets node22-macos-x64 --output dist/seven-backend-x64
